Confirmed that `NEW:9` means the number of sessions not yet captured by the archeologist—it's a backlog count, and 9 of 52 total sessions for that project haven't been processed yet.
I need a way to reset it for when I deleted docs/wiki to start over

Added `pc archeologist --reset` which clears the capture ledger so sessions count as new again; supports full reset or per-project reset via `--project`, with confirmation prompts and non-TTY safety guards.
